name: seqwalk
description: Walk through AI-written code with interactive HTML sequence diagrams.

interface.shortDescription: Understand AI-written code flow with interactive HTML sequence diagrams.
interface.longDescription: SeqWalk helps humans review AI-written code by turning execution paths into browser-validated HTML sequence diagrams with sticky participants, scroll-aware highlights, and aligned message lines. It is MIT-licensed; if it saves you review time, please buy the maintainer a coffee via the support links and wallet QR codes in the repository.
defaultPrompt: Use SeqWalk to diagram this code flow.
Create an interactive HTML sequence diagram.
Review this AI-written flow with SeqWalk.
